investorProfile.strategy: Capital growth — 5yr buy-and-hold — house only — 10% deposit + LMI at 90% LVR

marketContext.strategy: Multi-state — best growth with safety. WA and QLD lead growth, SA for value, VIC/NSW as watchlist.
marketContext.bankForecasts: ANZ: rate cuts H2 2026, Westpac: +3% national, NAB: +4.1%

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: CopperString $5B + Defence HMAS Cairns + Townsville Hospital expansion
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Kirwan is ESTABLISHED. New supply concentrated in Mount Low, Elliot Springs, northern beaches — NOT Kirwan itself. Kirwan is infill only.
suburbRankings.whyTop: Growth +28.2% — highest in AU. DOM 11 days — instant demand; Vacancy 0.5%

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: CopperString $5B + Defence HMAS Cairns + Townsville economy
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Established Townsville suburb. New supply concentrated in Mount Low/Elliot Springs, not Condon.

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: Perth southern corridor spillover + coastal growth + Perth undersupply
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Established coastal regional. Limited new supply, mostly infill.

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: Mid-West mining + renewables zone + Oakajee port (proposed)
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Regional coastal, limited new supply

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: Great Southern development + population growth + lifestyle migration

suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Inner Townsville established 6km from CBD. Infill only.
suburbRankings.whyTop: Inner Townsville 6km CBD. Stock 0.21% tightest; Defence catalyst

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: Kwinana Freeway $700M upgrade + southern Perth growth corridor
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: MEDIUM — Southern Perth growth corridor has ongoing land releases in adjacent suburbs (Secret Harbour, Singleton). Baldivis itself maturing.
suburbRankings.whyTop: Vacancy sub-1%. IRSAD 1010 good; $700M freeway upgrade

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: Kwinana Freeway upgrade + AUKUS Henderson Precinct proximity
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: MEDIUM — Newer estate, still developing. Kwinana greenfield nearby.
suburbRankings.whyTop: Own train station. Below $800k budget; Vacancy sub-1%

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: Metronet Byford Extension COMPLETED + AUKUS Henderson 30min
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Established suburb. Only infill development (small apartment buildings near station). No greenfield.
suburbRankings.whyTop: Metronet JUST COMPLETED Oct 2025. Median only $600k; Yield 5.26%

suburbRankings.primaryCatalyst: AUKUS Osborne shipyard 22min + Edinburgh Defence Precinct 15min
suburbRankings.supplyRisk: LOW — Established middle-ring infill only. No adjacent greenfield.
suburbRankings.whyTop: $520k entry — massive cash buffer. 5% yield; Established infill only

cashAnalysis.stampDutyQLD: ~$17k on $550k, ~$20k on $680k + QLD land tax if 2nd QLD property
cashAnalysis.stampDutyVIC: ~$25k on $545k + ~$8k investor surcharge — worst state for costs
cashAnalysis.bestCashFit: QLD Townsville ($550-600k): deposit $55-60k + stamp $17-20k + LMI $8-10k + legal $5k = $85-95k — fits easily with $15-25k buffer
cashAnalysis.worstCashFit: WA Perth ($750k): deposit $75k + stamp $26k + LMI $14k + legal $5k = $120k — EXCEEDS $110k cash
cashAnalysis.cashFitSummary: Properties under $680k fit $110k across ALL states. WA/QLD allow up to ~$700k. VIC surcharge adds $7-10k.

recommendation: KIRWAN QLD is the best risk-adjusted play: 88 composite score, $550k median (easy cash fit), 20% growth, LOW-MEDIUM risk, CopperString $5B catalyst + defence spending. Second pick CONDON QLD at $599k for same Townsville growth story. For WA diversification: MANDURAH at $575k offers 23.7% growth with coastal lifestyle. Para Hills SA offers AUKUS proximity with LOW crime. Avoid VIC (stamp surcharge kills cash fit) and NSW (transport too poor for the price). Strategy: QLD Townsville (2 suburbs) + WA coastal (1 suburb) = best diversified growth portfolio.
